notes: Source of truth for the item editor (ring tab). DCSS base types from item-prop-enum.h jewellery_type enum: RING_PROTECTION/STRENGTH/SLAYING/EVASION/STEALTH/DEXTERITY/INTELLIGENCE/MAGICAL_POWER/WILLPOWER + protection-from-fire/cold/poison resistance and ring of flight. Two ring slots planned (ring1, ring2). Stats lean small but stack — rings are the affix-spreader slot.

fortified.desc: Future: flat damage reduction. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

swiftness.desc: Future: +move speed. Currently: Agility affix bonus.

stealth.desc: Future: lower aggro range. Currently: Agility affix bonus.

regen.desc: Future: HP regen tick. Currently: Regen affix bonus.

fire_res.desc: Future: % damage reduction from fire. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

cold_res.desc: Future: % damage reduction from cold. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

poison_res.desc: Future: immune to poison DoT. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

willpower.desc: Future: magic resistance. Currently: Stamina affix bonus.

slaying.desc: Future: +accuracy and +damage. Currently: Strength affix bonus.

vision.desc: Future: see-invisible / extended fog reveal. Currently: no bonus.

footwork.desc: Future: dodge chance. Currently: Crit affix bonus.

flying.desc: Future: ignore lava/water hazards. Currently: Agility affix bonus.

fortune.desc: Future: bonus gold/loot. Currently: no bonus.

items.name: Wooden Ring
items.lore: A whittled circlet. Splinters more than it should.

items.name: Clay Ring
items.lore: Crude. Almost ceremonial.

items.name: Copper Ring
items.lore: Bright when new. Green now.

items.name: Brass Ring
items.lore: Stamped with a rune. The rune doesn't mean anything.

items.name: Bronze Ring
items.lore: Heavy enough to feel.

items.name: Iron Ring
items.lore: Hammered cold. Will not give.

items.name: Steel Ring
items.lore: Edge-tempered. Sharper than it looks.

items.name: Silver Ring
items.lore: Tingles when spells fly nearby.

items.name: Agate Ring
items.lore: Banded stone, polished smooth.

items.name: Moonstone Ring
items.lore: Glows faintly at night. Heals the same.

items.name: Tiger's Eye Ring
items.lore: It watches. It doesn't blink.

items.name: Tourmaline Ring
items.lore: The wearer ducks slightly more than necessary.

items.name: Coral Ring
items.lore: Smells faintly of the sea. Always.

items.name: Topaz Ring
items.lore: Warm to the touch.

items.name: Sapphire Ring
items.lore: Cold despite the air.

items.name: Ivory Ring
items.lore: Old. Yellowed. Forgotten by what made it.

items.name: Twisted Ring
items.lore: Looks like it was bent on purpose. Maybe.

items.name: Shiny Ring
items.lore: Polished beyond reason. Nobody likes the wearer in dim corridors.

items.name: Ruby Ring
items.lore: Hot to the touch. Hotter when struck.

items.name: Emerald Ring
items.lore: Green flecks. Always cool.

items.name: Diamond Ring
items.lore: Catches every light source on the floor.

items.name: Pearl Ring
items.lore: Iridescent. Cool against the skin.

items.name: Gold Ring
items.lore: Heavy. Worn by people who could afford a target.

items.name: Engagement Ring
items.lore: Inscribed with a name nobody remembers. Lights up around the right person.

items.name: The Octoring
items.lore: Eight in one. Or one in eight. Depends who's counting.

items.name: Ring of Robustness
items.lore: Thick. Indelicate. Effective.

items.name: Ring of Shadows
items.lore: The wearer's shadow does not always follow.

items.name: Shaolin Ring
items.lore: Worn by a fist that ended a war.

items.name: Ring of the Mage
items.lore: Drained of one mage's worth of magic. Now full of yours.

items.name: Glass Ring
items.lore: Cool. Fragile-feeling. Doesn't shatter.

items.name: Jade Ring
items.lore: Cold. Always cold. Even when hot.

items.name: Granite Band
items.lore: Heavy on the finger. Heavier on the mind.

items.name: Opal Ring
items.lore: Catches every color. Spits some back.

items.name: Black Onyx Ring
items.lore: Light declines to land on it. So do gazes.

items.name: Ring of Flight
items.lore: Heels barely brush the floor while it's worn.
Verdigris-greened copper that crackles when storms approach.
items.name: Coppersworn Ring of Flight

items.lore: Damp green spores drift from every notch — they twitch toward warm flesh.
items.name: Mossy Copper Ring

items.lore: Looking at it too long inverts what you saw before.
items.name: Inverse The Octoring

items.lore: A rime of ice will not melt, no matter how warm the room.
items.name: Frostbound Ruby Ring

items.lore: Hard to see in dim light, even when held directly before you.
items.name: Shadowed Moonstone Ring

items.lore: Every glance reveals a new color, each one a real one — somewhere.
items.name: Prismatic Bronze Ring

items.lore: Bleached past white into a color the eye cannot name.
items.name: Pale Twisted Ring

items.lore: The dark that settles on it cannot be polished off.
items.name: Umbral Agate Ring

items.lore: Plain forged iron, but heavier than the metal alone explains.
items.name: Ironclad Ring of the Mage

items.lore: The dark that settles on it cannot be polished off.
items.name: Umbral Ring of the Mage

items.lore: Looking at it too long inverts what you saw before.
items.name: Inverse Steel Ring

items.lore: Forged in dragonfire, the metal still glows when blood spills near it.
items.name: Crimson Ivory Ring

items.lore: Volcanic glass, edge-flaked razor-sharp by patient hands.
items.name: Obsidian Agate Ring

items.lore: Every glance reveals a new color, each one a real one — somewhere.
items.name: Prismatic Brass Ring

items.lore: Carved from one piece of imperial jade. Fault-lines make patterns.
items.name: Jade-forged Emerald Ring
